server_settings.name_trim: Name cannot have leading or trailing whitespace
server_settings.manage_denied: You do not have permission to manage this instance
server_settings.description_help: Shown on the welcome screen and used as the description for link previews.
server_settings.motd_help: Single-line message displayed in the chat header. Supports markdown.
server_settings.welcome_message_help: Shown on the login page. Supports markdown.
server_settings.logo_description: Upload a logo for your instance. Images will be resized to 512x512 pixels.
server_settings.banner_description: Upload a banner for your instance. The banner doubles as the link-preview image - images are resized to 1200x630 pixels (the standard OpenGraph aspect ratio).
